properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I love You, Lord For Your mercy never fails me All my days, I've been held in Your hands From the moment that I wake up Until I lay my head Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And all my life You have been faithful, And all my life You have been so, so good With every breath that I am able Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love Your voice You have led me through the fire And in darkest night You are close like no other I've known You as a Father I've known You as a Friend And I have lived in the goodness of God! (yeah)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And all my life You have been faithful, (oh) And all my life You have been so, so good With every breath that I am able Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God (yeah)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause Your goodness is running after, It's running after me Your goodness is running after, It's running after me With my life laid down, I'm surrendered now I give You everything 'Cause Your goodness is running after, It's running after me, (oh-oh)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: 'Cause Your goodness is running after, It's running after me Your goodness is running after, It's running after me With my life laid down, I'm surrendered now I give You everything 'Cause Your goodness is running after, It's running after me.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And all my life You have been faithful And all my life You have been so, so good With every breath that I am able Oh, I'm gonna sing of the goodness of God (I'm gonna sing, I'm gonna sing)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: 'Cause all my life You have been faithful And all my life You have been so, so good With every breath that I am able Oh, I'm gonna sing of the goodness of God Oh, I'm gonna sing of the goodness of God
